prompt: Using REFERENCE_1 as the main room base and REFERENCE_0 only as a cue for ordinary lived-in apartment realism, transform the room into a natural candid photo of three 20-year-old female college students hanging out. Keep the original cramped room layout, dark curtains, air conditioner, stained beige walls, low table, bedding/futon area, TV shelf, microwave area, scattered trash, drinks, and messy lived-in atmosphere. Add exactly 3 young women into the scene: one seated near the front-right foreground holding a canned drink, one seated by the low table opening or holding snacks, and one seated casually on the bedding at the back-right holding a phone. Dress them in casual Japanese school-uniform-like outfits: white shirts, dark ribbon ties, and plaid skirts. Make the photo feel completely unposed and realistic, like a smartphone snapshot taken during a small hangout, with warm dim indoor lighting and natural shadows. Faces should be anonymized/blurred or indistinct for privacy. Do not clean the room, do not make it stylish, and do not change the camera angle significantly. Emphasize that this is the same uploaded room, now looking like a hangout spot for three 20-year-old female college students.
